Container.Name: Moodarr
Container.Overview: Open-source Plex + Seerr companion app for natural-language discovery and explicit request creation. Before first Apply, pre-create the selected Appdata host path as UID/GID 999:999 with mode 0700; Unraid otherwise creates a missing bind path as 99:100, which this non-root image cannot write. See docs/UNRAID.md.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Before first Apply, pre-create this exact host path as UID/GID 999:999 with mode 0700 per docs/UNRAID.md. Persistent SQLite database, cached config, and runtime state.

Config.Name: Admin Token
Config.Description: Long random token required for admin writes and request creation when admin auth is enabled.

Config.Name: Web Origin
Config.Description: One canonical browser origin only (scheme, host, and mapped Web UI port; no path). For direct Unraid access, enter the IP origin opened by the Docker WebUI shortcut, for example http://192.0.2.10:4401, and always use that URL. If using a hostname or HTTPS reverse proxy, enter that origin and do not use the IP shortcut.

Config.Name: Require Admin Token
Config.Description: Require the admin token for protected actions.

Config.Name: Admin Container Session
Config.Description: Trusted-LAN convenience only. When enabled, any visitor who can load the bundled UI can receive admin access; keep false for explicit admin sign-in and Plex user separation.

Config.Name: Plex Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL reachable from the Moodarr container, for example http://plex:32400.

Config.Name: Plex Web URL
Config.Description: Plex Web base URL used for Open in Plex links.

Config.Name: Seerr Base URL
Config.Description: Overseerr/Jellyseerr-compatible base URL reachable from the Moodarr container.

Config.Name: Seerr API Key
Config.Description: Seerr/Jellyseerr API key. Stored server-side only.

Config.Name: Sync Interval Minutes
Config.Description: Set to 0 to disable scheduled sync.

Config.Name: Sync Seerr
Config.Description: Sync Seerr request/media status during scheduled sync.

Config.Name: Default Result Limit
Config.Description: Default number of recommendations shown when Finder or API requests omit an explicit result count.
